name: Excel Pawn And Jewelry
description_short: Excel Pawn operates two Minnesota locations offering collateral-based cash loans, gold and jewelry sales, and electronics trading with flexible payment options.
description_long:
Excel Pawn and Jewelry operates as a traditional pawn shop with two physical locations in Minnesota: Shakopee and Maplewood. The company has established itself as a local pawn and jewelry retailer serving the Twin Cities area, positioning itself with the tagline "Minnesota's Best Pawn Shop" on their website. Their business model centers on the typical pawn shop services of providing cash loans secured by collateral and buying/selling used goods.

Excel Pawn's core service offerings include cash loans against personal items (pawn loans), gold and jewelry buying and sales, and electronics trading. They emphasize competitive pricing on gold and jewelry purchases, and advertise flexible payment options for customers. The company operates extended hours across both locations, with the Shakopee store open Monday-Wednesday 10am-7pm, Thursday-Friday 10am-8pm, Saturday 9:30am-7pm, and Sunday 11am-5pm. The Maplewood location maintains Monday-Friday 10am-8pm hours, Saturday 9:30am-7pm, and Sunday 11am-5pm. They also promote the ability to request digital offers online for items customers wish to pawn or sell.

Excel Pawn distinguishes itself through multi-location availability in the Minneapolis-St. Paul area and their emphasis on "best prices" for gold and jewelry transactions. They advertise flexible payment arrangements and position customer service as a priority. They offer current promotions such as 10% off electronics purchases over $200.

The website provides limited detailed information about loan terms, interest rates, fees, or the specific mechanics of their pawn lending process. While the site emphasizes "safe shopping" powered by Stripe for online transactions, specific details about APR, redemption periods, or loan-to-value ratios are absent. The About Us page contains generic placeholder content about furniture rather than company-specific information, suggesting incomplete website development. Customers should contact locations directly to understand specific loan terms and conditions.
pros: Two convenient Minnesota locations (Shakopee and Maplewood) with extended hours including evening service
Offers both pawn loans (cash against collateral) and direct buying of gold, jewelry, and electronics
Online digital offer system allows customers to submit item descriptions for quotes before visiting
Current 10% discount on electronics purchases over $200
Advertises flexible payment options for purchases
Local business with established presence in Twin Cities market
cons: Website lacks critical loan term details: APR, loan-to-value ratios, redemption periods, and late fees are not disclosed
About Us page contains placeholder content about furniture rather than actual company background, suggesting poor website maintenance
No information provided about typical loan amounts, repayment terms, or what items are acceptable collateral
Limited transparency about the pawn loan process or fee structure compared to industry standards
Product inventory appears sparse on website with multiple 'No items found' sections
best_for: Individuals in the Twin Cities area needing quick cash against personal items (jewelry, electronics, etc.)
Customers looking to buy used gold, jewelry, or electronics at discount prices
People seeking an alternative to traditional lenders for short-term cash needs without credit checks
diagnosis: Excel Pawn is best for Twin Cities residents who need quick cash loans against personal property or who want to buy/sell used gold, jewelry, and electronics locally. The main caveat is that the website provides virtually no transparency about loan terms, rates, or fees—customers must visit in person or call (Shakopee: 952-445-1876, Maplewood: 651-488-0008) to understand specific borrowing costs.
services: Pawn loans (cash advances secured by collateral)
Digital offer quotes for items (online submission form)
Multiple location access (Shakopee and Maplewood stores)
Extended store hours including evenings and weekends
